info.title: Legacy Appeals
info.description:
The Legacy Appeals API lets you retrieve a claimant's active legacy appeals, which are not part of the Appeals Modernization Act (AMA) process. Claimants may be Veterans or dependents of Veterans, such as spouses, children (biological and step), and parents (biological and foster).

You can use legacy appeals data to file a Notice of Disagreement. [Learn more about managing a legacy appeal](https://www.va.gov/decision-reviews/legacy-appeals/).

To check the status of all decision reviews or appeals for a specified individual, use the [Appeals Status API](/explore/api/appeals-status/docs).

## Technical overview

### Authentication and authorization
The authorization model for the Legacy Appeals API uses OAuth 2.0/OpenID Connect. The following models are supported:
* [Authorization Code Grant (ACG)](/explore/api/legacy-appeals/authorization-code)
* [Client Credentials Grant (CCG)](/explore/api/legacy-appeals/client-credentials)

**Important:** To get production access using client credentials grant, you must either work for VA or have specific VA agreements in place. If you have questions, [contact us](/support/contact-us).

### Test data
Our sandbox environment is populated with [claimant test data](/explore/api/legacy-appeals/test-users) that can be used to test various response scenarios. This sandbox data contains no PII or PHI, but mimics real claimant account information.

get.summary: Returns eligible appeals in the legacy process for a claimant.
get.description: Returns eligible legacy appeals for a claimant.

parameters.name: icn
parameters.description: Claimant's Integration Control Number (ICN). Optional when using a veteran-scoped token. Required when using a representative- or system-scoped token.

errors.title: Forbidden
errors.detail: Invalid 'icn' parameter: claimants may access only their own records.

errors.title: Resource not found
errors.detail: A matching claimant was not found in our systems.

errors.title: Invalid pattern
errors.detail: '1234567890' did not match the defined pattern.

errors.title: Missing required fields
errors.detail: One or more expected fields were not found.

errors.title: Missing required fields
errors.detail: One or more expected fields were not found.

errors.title: Service Unavailable
errors.detail: Received an unusable response from upstream service.

example.message: The server took too long to respond

id.description: ID from VACOLS (Veteran Appeals Control and Locator Service)

decisionDate.description: Date of the appeal's original decision

latestSocSsocDate.description: Date of the appeal's most recent SOC/SSOC (Statement of Case/Supplemental Statement of Case)
